scenarios.capability: Create a correct mise.toml with pinned tools, tasks, and scoped environment variables for a new project
scenarios.reason: Agent can produce a well-formed mise.toml file with pinned versions, task definitions, and env vars following the skill's conventions.

scenarios.capability: Identify and fix anti-pattern violations in an existing mise.toml
scenarios.reason: Agent can review a supplied mise.toml, identify floating versions, embedded secrets, and implicit-state tasks, and produce a corrected version.

scenarios.capability: Produce a migration plan from an asdf `.tool-versions` file to a Mise `mise.toml`
scenarios.reason: Agent can convert a supplied .tool-versions file into an equivalent mise.toml with pinned versions and document the migration steps.

scenarios.capability: Define a set of deterministic CI-safe Mise tasks that replace existing npm scripts
scenarios.reason: Agent can convert npm package.json scripts into self-contained mise.toml task definitions following the determinism rules.
